title: Evidence Record
description: One source supporting one claim. See docs/methodology/citation-standard.md and evidence-hierarchy.md.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier cited by teardowns.

evidence_tier.description: Strength tier from the evidence hierarchy.

origin.description: URL, publication, or the literal 'first-hand observation'.

published_date.description: ISO publication date, or null if unknown.

accessed_date.description: ISO date the source was accessed or the observation was made.

archived_ref.description: Dated snapshot/archive reference; required in practice for volatile web sources.

unit_ref.description: Unit-of-analysis identifier; required when type == observation.

claim_support.description: What this source shows and, explicitly, its limits.

synthetic.description: True only for clearly-labelled illustrative examples.

allOf.description: Observations must reference the unit of analysis they were made under.
